verses.text: Faro kumpipa in Gaza khua a sim ma-in Filistia mite tawh kisai-in Topa in kei tungah thu hong gen hi

Topa in a hong genin-ah, “En un, leilu lam panin tui hong khang ding a, hong letkhia-in hong luang ding hi. Gamsung leh gamsunga om khempeuh hong tum ding a, khuapi leh a sunga teng khempeuh hong tum ding hi. Mite kiko ding uh a, gamsunga om mi khempeuh a kap ding uh hi
Sakol khegingte za-in, sakol leeng gingte leh a pei kigawite a zak uh ciangin, a khut uh zaw luata ahih manin pate in a tate uh a donzo nawn kei ding uh hi

Filistia mi khempeuh kisia-in, Taia leh Sidon panin huhnate khaktanin, suksiat ding ni hong tungta hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa keimah in Filistia mite leh Kaftor tuipi gei-ah a omlaite ka susia ding hi
Gaza khuate maizum ta uh a, Ashkelon khua kisia ta hi. Aw, no Anak mi a omlaite aw, bang tanvei no leh no kisuliam ding na hi uh hiam
Note in, ‘ Topa' namsau aw, tawlnga nailo ding na hi hiam? Na paai sungah lutkik in la, taangloin khawl dide in,’ na ci uh hi
Topa in ka sawl nak leh bang ci-in khawl dide thei ding ahi hiam? Ashkelon khua leh tuipi gei teng a sim dingin ka sawlsa ahi hi,” a hong ci hi.
